texto: We go through life and don't pay attention to God even when he's yelling. Then there are the moments you never expect and can't avoid. It is at those times when you can hear him ever so clearly
explicacao: Citação de even when he's whispering. sobre limites e escolhas conscientes. “We go through life and don't pay attention to God even when he's yelling. Then there are the mome…” articula reflexao, benjamin-j-carey, through em registro de reflexao, com relevância para contextos como reflexao.
